body_txt: Drugs Are Bad . But for some people, any sort of run-in with drugs, including alcohol — and in some cases, extended to smoking and even prescription drugs as well — makes you instantly less of a human being. These people feel not only that alcohol and other drugs should be avoided , but that those who don't accept this philosophy are weak, brainwashed, generally inferior . In especially extreme cases, this attitude even applies toward people who have recovered from past problems with drugs, or have only done them once . Naturally, such people also often double as Moral Guardians . Direct descendant of the Dry Crusader and often shares the Dry Crusader's self-righteousness. Sister Trope to Sour Prudes , who take a similar condescending attitude to characters who indulge in sexual activities. Not to be confused with Straight Edge Evil , although villainous straight-edge characters often fall into this. If too villainous or smug, it's not unheard of for the Smug Straight Edgers to be less than sincere in their convictions , if not an outright Straw Hypocrite . Contrast Drug Based Characterization , where a character's needs and motivations are reflected by the drugs they take. No Real Life Examples, Please!
